summary: Frontend-only testing of restructured Pricing page with 5 fully-managed tiers. All visual, content, and interactive requirements pass. 5 tier cards render with correct data-testids and pricing data; MOST POPULAR badge visible on hosting tier; enterprise dark card shows Custom Pricing with 10 features; CTAs navigate to /contact; GR/EN language toggle correctly switches tier names, taglines, features and CTAs; monthly/yearly toggle has been fully removed.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> appearing as child of <option> in contact-select. Caused by visual-edit injected x-component <span> wrapper inside <option> at Contact.jsx line 127. Not blocking, but worth fixing by stripping wrappers or moving preselectedPlan rendering. Pricing page itself has no console errors.

critical_code_review_comments: Pricing.jsx is well-structured (~217 lines, two focused components TierCard + EnterpriseCard).
The `key` variable destructured from tier shadows React's reserved prop name conceptually (no actual collision since not passed as prop here, but consider renaming to `tierKey` for clarity).

Hardcoded 'Tailored to your organization' and 'Enterprise Tier' strings inside EnterpriseCard are not internationalized — they remain English even when GR is selected. Consider moving to translations.js.
data-testid pattern is consistent: pricing-tier-{key} and pricing-cta-{key} for all 5 tiers — good for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing page (/pricing) restructure verified fully working. All 5 tiers (starter €79, business €150 subtle highlight, hosting €250/€70 with MOST POPULAR glow, infrastructure €400/€120 with Crown premium border, enterprise dark card with Custom Pricing + 10 features) render and behave correctly in both GR and EN. CTAs navigate to /contact. Cookie consent should be set via localStorage('itg_cookie_consent','accepted') before navigating /pricing to avoid banner overlap. Note: /contact page has a hydration warning involving option/span - pre-existing, not related to pricing changes.
